description_long: This is a heavy-duty sledgehammer featuring a large, rectangular, solid metal head with a slightly weathered, matte gray finish. The head is blocky and robust, with flat striking faces on both ends, designed for delivering powerful blows to hard surfaces. The handle is long, straight, and made of wood, showing a natural grain and a smooth, cylindrical shape that tapers slightly towards the end for grip. The transition between the wooden handle and the metal head is seamless, with the handle securely embedded into the head. There are no visible markings, logos, or decorative elements on either the head or the handle. The overall appearance suggests a utilitarian tool built for strength and durability, suitable for demolition or construction tasks in urban environments.
description: A robust sledgehammer with a large, rectangular metal head and a long, straight wooden handle. The tool has a utilitarian, weathered look, ideal for heavy-duty urban tasks.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from the narrow side, showing the square face of the metal head and the full length of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: This view displays the broad, flat face of the metal head and the straight alignment of the handle beneath it.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, the narrow side of the head is visible, with the handle extending downward.
description_view_3: The broad face of the head is shown again, mirroring view 1, with the handle centered below.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle, cylindrical, smooth, natural wood grain, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledgehammer head, solid steel, flat striking faces on both ends, no claws or peens
